_comment: turn.json schema — copy this template for every turn-close push
title: Short title describing what happened this turn (5-10 words)
q_summary: One sentence: what Jared asked or directed (25 words max)
a_summary: 2-3 sentences: what Bob built, decided, or shipped this turn (50 words max)
decisions: Key decision made this turn (one line each)

inbox_messages_sent.summary: one line of what was sent

notion_ops_queued: filename of any .json queued to notion-ops-queue
